message:
test(core): add property-based tests for starvation prevention (ft-2p9cb.2.4.3)

9 proptests: starvation capped at threshold, Gini bounded, epoch monotonic,
clears on service, reset zeroes, serde roundtrips for FairnessSnapshot/
StarvationEvent/FairnessDegradation/StarvationConfig. 122 proptests total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
